elements.description: A smiling delivery person in a bright uniform holds a package, standing next to a red and white delivery van on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A cozy couch with a person lounging, holding a remote, facing a flat-screen TV. A table nearby has a burger, fries, and a soda on a tray. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
